title: Misatos NERV Ringtone Available for Download
display_title: Misatos NERV Ringtone Available for Download
wikitext:
[]: Misato's NERV Ringtone Available for Download             Quote Post by zuka » Sun Oct 31, 2010 11:56 pm dudes and dudettes, I really liked Misato's ringtone from Rebuild 2, so I made it an MP3 file to use on my phone. I figured I'd upload it here in case anyone else likes it. Now whenever I get a call I wonder if it's Commander Ikari. Interesting trivia - the ringtone is one of King Ghidora's roars from the old Godzilla films. Here it is: http://www.mediafire.com/?k3tb6dt7eknbxn3 Cheers Zuka

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Mon Nov 01, 2010 12:57 am Thanks. It's a little unsettling, though. :P

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Nov 01, 2010 4:12 am Thanks -- that's interesting trivia. Although, of course, when Gendo calls, her phone plays this ringtone .

[]: Now if only I can get people to call me...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Nov 04, 2010 6:22 pm That's awesome. I'm taking my phone off vibrate-only just for this.

[]: Re: Misato's NERV Ringtone Available for Download             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Nov 04, 2010 7:58 pm Enjoy your Ultraman ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by paulpierce » Tue Nov 16, 2010 1:37 am I just watched 2.22 today for the first time, I knew that was Ghidorah. also, this is my first post.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Nov 16, 2010 12:25 pm drinian wrote: this ringtone .

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Tue Nov 16, 2010 1:53 pm drinian wrote: Thanks -- that's interesting trivia. Although, of course, when Gendo calls, her phone plays this ringtone .

[]:             Quote Post by Bagu » Mon Jan 03, 2011 12:39 pm i am unable to access this ringtone. can any send it to my email? [email protected]

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 03, 2011 9:12 pm I put a copy of the mp3 on the site: http://www.evageeks.org/audio/%5Bzuka%5D_nerv_ringtone.mp3

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Jan 03, 2011 9:33 pm Is this the ringtone from when she's in the restaurant with Kaji?

[]:             Quote Post by zuka » Mon Mar 21, 2011 5:32 am Sure is buddy

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Sat Sep 07, 2013 8:03 pm can anyone reupload it :(? i lost it a while ago and now the link's down.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Sep 07, 2013 10:57 pm Ornette's link worked for me.

[]: Is not king ghidorah rintone             Quote Post by Uzzi » Wed Aug 27, 2014 1:24 am I totally disagree, if you listen accurately (for example when Misato is having diner with Kaji), is not king ghidorah, is more like metal gear solid 2 codec ringtone, you can compare in utube or here: http://www.mediafire.com/download/y72u79zdad3gjzd/Metal+Gear+Solid+2+Codec.mp3
